nodes.name: Myzomela
nodes.summary: Myzomela（Myzomela）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联41种鸟类，如Drab myzomela、White-chinned myzomela、Ruby-throated myzomela等41种鸟类。

nodes.name: Long-billed myzomela
nodes.summary: Long-billed myzomela（Myzomela longirostris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Long-billed myzomela。

nodes.name: Long-billed myzomela
nodes.summary: The long-billed myzomela (Myzomela longirostris) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found on Goodenough Island (d'Entrecasteaux Islands, Papua New Guinea). It was formerly considered a subspecies of the red-collared myzomela (Myzomela rosenbergii), but was split as a distinct species by the IOC in 2021. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
